flavourText: A colossal being woven from polysaccharides and peptide chains. Break its bonds to defeat it.

dialogue.intro: I am held together by hydrogen bonds, glycosidic links and peptide bonds. Think you can break them all?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Let us begin with the basics. Name my monomers, if you can.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Knowing the names is easy. Can you explain how my polymers form?
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Time to write like an examiner is watching. Show me the full picture.
damageTaken: That answer hit like a condensation reaction!
dialogue.lowHp: My tertiary structure is unravelling... but I am not done yet!
dialogue.defeated: You hydrolysed every last bond. Impressive work.
dialogue.survived: Your knowledge of biological molecules needs more polymerisation. Try again.

flavourText: Rules the cell with an iron membrane. Each organelle obeys its command.

dialogue.intro: Every organelle in this cell answers to me. Let us see if you know their roles.
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name my organelles. Quick, before the cell cycle moves on.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Identification is one thing. Can you explain how they work together?
dialogue.extendedTaunt: The extended response awaits. Prove you understand the whole cell.
dialogue.lowHp: My nuclear envelope is breaking down... this feels like prophase!
dialogue.defeated: You have mastered every organelle. The cell is yours.
dialogue.survived: You need to look more closely under that electron microscope. Return when ready.

flavourText: Controls what enters and exits. Nothing passes without its approval.

dialogue.intro: Nothing crosses my phospholipid bilayer without permission. Prove you understand the rules.
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define my transport mechanisms. Passive and active alike.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Definitions are easy. Can you explain why water potential matters?
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final phase. Show me you truly understand membrane transport.
damageTaken: That answer diffused right through my defences!
dialogue.lowHp: My fluid mosaic is losing its integrity!
dialogue.defeated: You have breached every barrier. Well transported.
dialogue.survived: My membrane remains intact. Your understanding needs more concentration.

flavourText: An ancient guardian of the active site, armed with knowledge of saturation.

dialogue.intro: Think you understand my active sites? Let us see...
dialogue.recallTaunt: Let us start with the basics. Name your substrates.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Knowing terms is one thing. Can you apply them?
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Time for the extended response. Show me everything.
dialogue.lowHp: I will not denature that easily!
dialogue.defeated: You have catalysed my defeat... well played.
dialogue.survived: Not enough to break my bonds. Try again.

flavourText: Unwinds the double helix and rewrites the code. Decode its message to win.

dialogue.intro: I carry the code of life itself. Can you read my base sequences?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Recall the basics. What bonds hold my strands together?
dialogue.applicationTaunt: You know the structure. Now explain how I replicate and transcribe.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: The final codon. Write your extended response before termination.
dialogue.lowHp: My helicase cannot keep up with your answers!
dialogue.defeated: You have read my entire genome. Flawless translation.
dialogue.survived: Your answer contained too many mutations. Come back with better proofreading.

flavourText: Pulls chromosomes apart with spectral spindle fibres. Divide and conquer.

dialogue.intro: I pull chromosomes apart with every division. Can you keep up with my phases?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name the stages of mitosis. The clock is ticking.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: You know the stages. Now explain why they matter.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final division. Show me you understand the whole cycle.
dialogue.lowHp: I am stuck in anaphase... my chromatids are pulling apart!
dialogue.defeated: Complete division. You have split me into nothing.
dialogue.survived: Your cell cycle knowledge has stalled in interphase. Revise and return.

flavourText: Moves silently across every surface. Thin, efficient, relentless.

dialogue.intro: I move across every exchange surface in the body. Can you explain how?
dialogue.recallTaunt: What makes a good exchange surface? List the features.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Features are easy to list. Can you explain why they matter?
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Extended response time. Bring together everything you know about gas exchange.
damageTaken: That answer maintained a steep gradient!
dialogue.lowHp: My concentration gradient is almost flat!
dialogue.defeated: You have mastered every exchange surface. Nothing left to diffuse.
dialogue.survived: Your answers lacked sufficient surface area. Build up your knowledge and return.

flavourText: Pumps with unstoppable force. Feel the pressure of every heartbeat.

dialogue.intro: I pump blood through every vessel. Can you trace the full circulatory pathway?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name the chambers, the valves, the vessels. Quick.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Structure is only half the story. Explain the cardiac cycle.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: The final heartbeat. Write your most complete answer yet.
damageTaken: That hit me in the left ventricle!
dialogue.lowHp: My heart rate is dropping... bradycardia setting in!
dialogue.defeated: You have stopped my heart. Clinically precise work.
dialogue.survived: Your understanding is still in diastole. Pump harder next time.

flavourText: Harvests energy from glucose with ruthless efficiency.

dialogue.intro: I harvest every molecule of ATP from glucose. Do you know how?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name the stages of respiration. Where does each one happen?
dialogue.applicationTaunt: You know the stages. Now explain the biochemistry.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final stage. Show me you understand aerobic and anaerobic pathways.
damageTaken: My electron transport chain is faltering!
dialogue.lowHp: My ATP synthase is running dry!
dialogue.defeated: You have depleted all my energy reserves. Total oxidation.
dialogue.survived: Your answers were anaerobic at best. Not enough ATP to defeat me.

flavourText: Absorbs light and converts it to power. Outshine it or be consumed.

dialogue.intro: I capture every photon that reaches me. Can you explain how I turn light into sugar?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name the stages and where they occur. Light and dark.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: You know the reactions. Now explain the limiting factors.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: The final photon. Write your most illuminating answer.
damageTaken: Brilliant understanding of the Calvin cycle!
dialogue.lowHp: My light-dependent reactions are shutting down!
dialogue.defeated: You have outshone me completely. Photolysis achieved.
dialogue.survived: Your knowledge was light-limited. Increase your intensity and return.

flavourText: Maintains perfect balance. Any deviation triggers its wrath.

dialogue.intro: I keep every variable within its set point. Disturb my balance if you dare.
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define negative feedback. Name the receptors and effectors.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: Definitions are stable. Can you apply them to blood glucose and temperature?
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final regulation. Show me a complete homeostatic response.
dialogue.lowHp: I cannot maintain homeostasis much longer!
dialogue.defeated: You have thrown me completely off balance. Perfect regulation.
dialogue.survived: Your answers fluctuated too much. Find your set point and try again.

flavourText: Commands all trophic levels. Disrupt its food web to claim victory.

dialogue.intro: I command every trophic level in this ecosystem. Can you trace the energy flow?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Define the key ecological terms. Producers, consumers, decomposers.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: You know the terms. Now explain energy transfer and succession.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: The final trophic level. Write about the whole ecosystem.
damageTaken: You have disrupted my energy flow!
dialogue.lowHp: My population is crashing... carrying capacity breached!
dialogue.defeated: You have collapsed my entire ecosystem. Apex knowledge.
dialogue.survived: Your understanding barely reached the first trophic level. Climb higher.

flavourText: Evades every immune defence. Identify its antigens and mount a response before it overwhelms you.

dialogue.intro: I evade every immune response. Can you identify my antigens before I overwhelm you?
dialogue.recallTaunt: Name the cells of the immune system. B cells, T cells, phagocytes.
dialogue.applicationTaunt: You know the cells. Now explain the full immune response.
dialogue.extendedTaunt: Final antigen. Show me you understand both cellular and humoral immunity.
dialogue.lowHp: Immunological memory is forming against me!
dialogue.defeated: You have mounted a complete immune response. I am neutralised.
dialogue.survived: Your immune response was too slow. I have mutated and returned stronger.
